---
title: "{phenotools} 0.5.0 ready for use"
format: html
date: 06/19/2026
date-format: full
---

An updated version of the phenotools packaged (0.5.0) is available and can be installed as described on [the GitHub](https://github.com/psychgen/phenotools). Please report any bugs there by raising an issue.

You can see a summary of all the changes in the latest version [here](https://github.com/psychgen/phenotools/blob/master/NEWS.md).

The most consequential of the changes is that you can now pull in variables from *any* file with MoBa ids. This means it should now be possible to curate your entire dataset from a `curate_datset()` call – including variables from questionnaires outside the core collections of Q1-Q14y previously supported by the package. For more information read the vignette in the [Using phenotypic data section](../pheno_vignette.qmd) or by running `vignette("phenotools")` wherever you have the package installed.
